description.ko: 유리를 통해 굴절되는 빛의 미학을 담아낸 시각적 연구로, 순백의 광선을 선명한 색채 스펙트럼과 기하학적 광채로 변화시킵니다.
description.en: A visual study of light as it bends through glass, transforming pure white rays into a vivid spectrum of color and geometric brilliance.

prompt: Cinematic close-up of a high-clarity glass prism refracting a single beam of white light into a vibrant, ethereal rainbow spectrum, sharp focus on the chromatic dispersion, soft bokeh background with pastel light leaks, 8k resolution, minimalist and clean aesthetic.
